title: armeria duriensis subsp. sublittorea
intro: Armeria duriensis subsp. sublittorea, also known as a coastal thrift, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the genus Armeria. It is a succulent perennial that thrives in rocky, coastal areas and has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation and soothing skin irritations, and has been used to treat conditions such as eczema and acne. Armeria duriensis subsp. sublittorea can be used in herbal preparations like teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
